items.name: Punjabi Chicken
items.description: Punjabi Chicken is a popular North Indian dish known for its rich, thick gravy or rustic, aromatic masala coating. items.name: Daal Fry
items.description: [veg preparation] Dal fry is a popular, comforting Indian dish made by cooking lentils [usually split pigeon peas or Toor dal] until soft, then simmering them in a flavorful tempering of ghee, onion, tomato, garlic, ginger, spices like cumin and red chili. It is a creamy, spiced thick curry and often served with rice or roti.

items.name: Daal Tadka
